codeReview.summary: Feature intent is met. The worker verified that research/debug artifacts and cli_utils instrumentation were already committed in prior commits, performed secret checks, and created the requested investigation commit message. The resulting commit is safe and does not expose keys.

issues.description: This commit bundles additional model-config and .factory changes beyond the explicit staging paths in the feature description. The feature still succeeds, but scope expansion makes the commit less audit-friendly.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The debug-worker skill has procedures for instrumentation, script creation, experiment execution, and analysis, but no commit-only/cleanup procedure. The worker had to improvise a commit flow and explicitly requested this addition in skillFeedback.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/debug-worker/SKILL.md has only sections at lines 20, 30, 38, and 48; handoff skillFeedback.suggestedChanges asks for a commit/cleanup section.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission AGENTS test guidance is inconsistent with current known pre-existing failures and service-level test command. AGENTS recommends excluding only one failing test, while service command excludes additional known failures (formula + canary), which caused iterative reruns in the worker transcript.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /home/ubuntu/.factory/missions/ba94244c-8343-4186-8ee5-9d59460ef8a8/AGENTS.md line 80 vs .factory/services.yaml line 3; transcript skeleton shows repeated pytest -k adjustments.

summary: Reviewed handoff, commit diff, transcript skeleton, mission AGENTS, services, and library context. Marking pass with one non-blocking scope note and two shared-state observations.
